_about: PROTECTED default drone model — snapshot of sitl_copter (generic 1.5 kg quadrotor, ue_physics backend, ArduCopter SITL). The Models menu refuses to edit or delete it; duplicate it to make an editable model. Plant: UDronePhysicsComponent (no fixed-wing fields).

_doc.mass_kg: Total vehicle mass in kg — with full battery, no payload.
_doc.inertia_roll_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the roll axis (X), kg·m².
_doc.inertia_pitch_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the pitch axis (Y), kg·m².
_doc.inertia_yaw_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the yaw axis (Z), kg·m². Usually the largest.
_doc.arm_length_m: Distance from centre to each motor, metres (half the motor-to-motor diagonal).
_doc.collision_radius_m: Bounding-sphere radius for inter-vehicle collision, metres.
_doc.cg_offset_x_m: CG offset from geometric centre along body X (forward positive), metres. STORED for the future CG model — not yet consumed.
_doc.cg_offset_y_m: CG offset along body Y (right positive), metres. Stored.
_doc.cg_offset_z_m: CG offset along body Z (down positive), metres. Stored.
_doc.air_density: Air density in kg/m³. Stored for the drone plant (linear drag model today).
